title: vicia subulata
intro: Vicia subulata, also known as the prostrate vetch or creeping vetch, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been employed to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Vicia subulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Vicia subulata is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
